title: Marketing Executive, Digital Marketing & E-Commerce
description:
• Exclusive for Singapore Citizens and Permanent Residents (PRs) only

  • Regional exposure across Singapore and Rest of Asia, managing multiple in-house consumer brands across Gaming Accessories (main), Workplace Peripherals, and Office Productivity solutions

  • Hands-on ownership of E-Commerce, Social Media, Influencer Marketing, and Offline Retail Execution

  • Must be proficient in Adobe Photoshop (and/or Illustrator)

Responsibilities

  • Manage daily operations across e-commerce platforms including Amazon, Shopee, Lazada, KrisShop, ensuring smooth product onboarding, catalog optimisation, campaign setup, order fulfilment, advertising management, invoicing, and reporting

  • Oversee social media accounts, creating content, running and optimising ads, and managing influencer campaigns from briefing to performance reporting

  • Support marketing collaborations such as sponsorships, IP partnerships, and offline retail collateral, including design approvals and vendor coordination

  • Develop localised marketing assets for export distributors to support international sales, including translating content from English to Traditional Chinese for Hong Kong market

  • Drive go-to-market initiatives to grow business in domestic and regional markets

  • Assist product management with multiple new product launches to support team workload

  • Provide ad-hoc support and cross-functional assistance as needed

Additional Details

  • Working Hours: Monday - Friday, 8:15 AM - 5:45 PM

  • Working Location: International Business Park (Jurong East)

Requirements

  • Min 2-3 years of Product/Digital Marketing experience
  • Must be proficient Adobe Photoshop
  • Minimum Diploma in Marketing, Communications, or related field
  • Prior exposure to Console Gaming or Consumer Electronics is ideal, and candidates who are personally familiar with gaming will have an edge

Interested?

  • Apply via the "Apply" button.
  • For more information, contact Mr. Wein Ng at 8837 5170 for a confidential discussion

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified

EA Personnel Name: Ng Weineng
EA Personnel No: R1985639
EA License No: 02C4944

postedCompany.description:
Since our humble beginnings in 2002, People Profilers has steadily grown from strength to strength. Our expertise in providing Human Capital consultancy to our clients – universally sought after skills and expertise in just about any sector– has allowed People Profilers to leave an imprint across various industries and build a reputation for competency and expertise.

 

What differentiates People Profilers from every other recruiter is our unwavering commitment to building relationships with our clients- understanding exactly what our clients are after, and allowing us to match their precise needs. We deliver human capital solutions that allow organisations and their employees to succeed.

 

Here at People Profilers, we pride ourselves on being a one-stop human capital solutions provider for your organisation. Our innovative and relationship-focused workforce solutions have been provided across a wide range of industries.
postedCompany.name: PEOPLE PROFILERS PTE. LTD.
